field.name: clicktt_club_ids
field.label: Club IDs
field.description: Configure click-tt.de club IDs for import. One entry per line, format: FEDERATION|CLUB_ID|LABEL (e.g., battv|6658|Erwachsene). The federation is the subdomain prefix on click-tt.de.

field.name: clicktt_club_name
field.label: Club Name
field.description: The official club name as it appears on click-tt.de (used for schedule/ranking matching)

field.name: clicktt_club_number
field.label: mytischtennis.de Club Number
field.description: The club number on mytischtennis.de (e.g., 445) — used for historical import

field.name: mytischtennis_club_url
field.label: Club URL (override)
field.description: Full URL override for the club page — leave empty to use the auto-built URL

field.name: player_visible_fields
field.label: Visible Player Fields
field.description: Which player fields are visible on the public frontend

field.name: default_placeholder_image
field.label: Placeholder Image
field.description: Path to the default placeholder image

field.name: ranking_cache_duration
field.label: Ranking Cache Duration (seconds)
field.description: Cache duration in seconds for ranking table data

field.name: schedule_cache_duration
field.label: Schedule Cache Duration (seconds)
field.description: Cache duration in seconds for match schedule data from click-tt.de

fieldset.name: permissions
fieldset.label: Permissions
fieldset.description: Configure access permissions for this component
